_disabled_mcpServers__claude_context_nee._comment: claude-context requires Milvus on 127.0.0.1:19530 (not running). Ollama on 11434 IS up. To enable: run `docker run -d -p 19530:19530 milvusdb/milvus:latest`, then move this entry into mcpServers above.

_disabled_mcpServers__postgresql_needs_c._comment: postgresql server requires POSTGRES_CONNECTION_STRING env var (not set anywhere — not in ~/.zshrc, .env files, or shell). The project's primary DB is WordPress MySQL on WPCom, not Postgres — this entry may have been speculative. To enable: set POSTGRES_CONNECTION_STRING in ~/.zshrc, then move this entry into mcpServers above.
